title: Ingrid’s physician has told her that her health was beyond medical treatment, and her chances of dying within the next 1…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Ingrid’s physician has told her that her health was beyond medical treatment, and her chances of dying within the next 12 months were 90 percent. “I’m sorry,” Ingrid replied, “that’s not right. Please run the tests again while I get a third opinion. I’m not sure why you’re lying to me.” What stage of dealing with dying is Ingrid in?
Group of answer choices

Denial

Depression

Acceptance

Bargaining

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
When Troy and Dayvonne’s mother was diagnosed with terminal cancer, they decided to care for her at home using a comprehensive program of support services that provided an interdisciplinary care team who emphasized quality of life with palliative care. Troy and Dayvonne’s mother’s care plan was consistent with which approach?
Group of answer choices

A) home health

C) home hospital

B) hospice

D) long-term care
